title: desmodium obtusum
intro: Desmodium obtusum, also known as Stick-tight or Hitchweed, is a perennial herb native to the southeastern United States and the Caribbean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Desmodium obtusum include relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Desmodium obtusum can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it can also be used in tinctures and salves for topical application.
